title: The Motel's Machine Memory

features.name: the boiler room chronicle
features.desc-on-touch: you trace the years in rust and replacement; each pipe rewelded tells when guests arrived, when they stopped coming, when the building chose to hold its heat differently

features.name: thermostat echo
features.desc-on-touch: the climate control learned to repeat itself; it cycles through all the temperatures the motel ever needed

features.name: the wiring diagram memory
features.desc-on-touch: copper paths remember every circuit change; you can read the motel's renovations in the colour of the wire

features.name: utility shaft descent
features.desc-on-touch: downward into the basement where all the building's systems converge and speak to each other in the language of pressure and flow

features.name: the water meter turning
features.desc-on-touch: still counting, still recording — not guests anymore, but the building's internal conversations with itself

inscription: the machines kept better records than the guest book; they remember every temperature, every flow, every time the building woke

file.name: HVAC_Maintenance_Log_1976-2039.txt
file.note: service records show the motel dying backward through time — each entry unwrites the one before, until the building remembers being new

exits.label: up to the corridors where time still counts hours
deeper, where the building's original foundations remember their own systems
